semantics.furnitureLayouts: Executable source layouts; Lodestone placement is available only where the negotiated native writer accepts the compiled block-state specs and remains bounded, permission-gated, and rollback-safe.
semantics.buildingPatterns: Metadata and construction guidance only; Vibecraft's referenced structured placement file is absent.
semantics.terrainPatterns: Metadata and manual guidance only; no structured placement representation is present.
semantics.buildingTemplates: Prompt and command-sequence guidance; not an executable compiler.
